NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-14-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01

DEPT 1/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY STEVEN MACDONALD PRESENT FOR PLTF. ATNY ROBERT LEBERMAN PRESENT FOR DEFTS MORPHS OUTPOST AND BLAST PUBLISHING. DEFT L2 COMMUNICATIONS HAS BEEN DISMISSED FROM COMPLAINT. CASE SETTLED AS TO DEFT MORPHS OUTPOST. JUDGMNT ON PLEADINGS AS TO DEFT BLAST PUBLISHING. PLTF TO SUBMIT ONE JUDGMNT DETAILING BOTH DEFTS.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, SUBMISSION OF JUDGMENT STATUS, JUDGMENT REACHED CONTINUED TO OCT-15-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04

TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION DISPOSITION CALENDAR OF OCT-15-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON OCT-15-1996, AS TO WHY THERE HAS BEEN NO DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT. IF NO JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL COURT WILL IMPOSE SANCTIONS. HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF STEVEN A. MACDONALD, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF JACK EMMETS DBA CORPORATE IMPRESSIONS FILED IN RE DEFAULT OF DEFENDANT MORPHS OUTPOST.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORPHS OUTPOST, A BUSINESS ORGANIZATION BLAST PUBLISHING INC. A BUSINESS ORGANIZATION $9,418.59 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,418.59, JUDGMENT UPON DECLARATION ORDERED ENTERED AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMT IN FAVOR OF PLTF & AGAINST DEFT BLAST PUBLISHING IN THE AMT OF $9418.59. IT IS ALSO ORDERED THAT JUDGMNT ENTER IN FAVOR OF PLTF & AGAINST OTHER DEFT MORPHS OUTPOST IN THE AMOUNT OF $2045.23 PERSUANT TO DEFAULT UPON STIPULATION. COSTS WAIVED.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-14-1996, OFF CALENDAR
